body: Hi, this is William from Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). I noticed {business_name} doesn't have a website. 80% of customers search online before calling. Just launched sites for 3 Naples gyms - all saw 40%+ more calls. Want to see examples? Reply STOP to opt out.
notes: TCPA-compliant version of no_website_intro. Adds business name + phone.
improvements_from_v1: Added 'from Marceau Solutions' for business identification
Added phone number (239-398-5676) for TCPA compliance
Added social proof '3 Naples gyms saw 40%+ more calls'
Added specific outcome instead of generic offer
